scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:functions: npm install --prefix functions && npm run build --prefix functions
scripts.deploy:firebase: npm run build -w client && npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting,functions --force --project smp-cashbook
